purpose: Compact project display/model index used by sequencing agents for current target identity, fingerprints, model/group/submodel structure, custom model construction, and node layout summaries.
planningRules: Use target fingerprints and parent linkage before display-name-only reasoning.
Treat custom models as normal model records with optional customStructure enrichment, not as a separate target collection.
Treat submodels as first-class targets for every parent model type.
Preserve explicit submodel targets unless the request safely collapses to a broader parent or group target.
Use nodeLayout and customStructure as structural evidence only; do not infer user/vendor semantic prop meaning from hard-coded model names.
Use display metadata and target-behavior evidence for user-specific semantics and learned effect suitability.
notes: This contract describes the portable training shape, not a raw xLights API payload.
Training examples should include built-in models, groups, custom model records, and submodel records in the same target collection.
If a custom-only diagnostic export is needed, derive it from display/model-index.json at export time.
